title: Anne of Windy Poplars
writer: Michael Kanin, Jerome Cady, Lucy Maud Montgomery
actors: Anne Shirley, James Ellison, Henry Travers
plot: Anne Shirley, now betrothed to her childhood sweetheart Gilbert Blythe, takes a teaching position in a prestigious school far from her home on Prince Edward Island. While she is quickly accepted by her host family, the rest of the...
